variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11644 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11644 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11644 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1694 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11644
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1694 air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
